use_cases: Triggering form submissions and actions in web applications
Providing clickable CTAs with multiple visual styles
Enabling accessible button interactions with focus states
Using variant props for contextual button styling
ai_summary: A flexible button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, small, large, icon). Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, CVA for variant management, and includes accessibility features like focus-visible outlines and disabled states. Supports shadow effects and hover transitions for polished interactive experiences.
